title: Career Definitions
description: Defines pawn careers: what they did professionally before appearing in the game. Each career grants starting skill bonuses during pawn generation.

name.description: Display name shown during crew recruitment and on the pawn info screen.

description.description: Backstory text describing what this person did for a living.

skill_bonuses.description: Starting skill level bonuses granted by this career.

SkillBonus.description: A starting bonus applied to a specific skill.

id.description: The skill ID to apply the bonus to.

amount.description: Number of skill levels to add (positive) or subtract (negative).
